result.stdout:
MangoSeed 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Giovanni Galbo

  -c, --collection              Required. The source collection

  -q, --query                   Required. ExportAsync query. example:
                                {name:'Harry'}

  --destination                 Destination path

  --disable-pretty-print        When disabled, json output is not indented

  --no-logo                     (Default: false) Skip logo

  -u, --user                    Username

  -p, --password                Password.  Alternatively use environment
                                variable MANGOSEED_DB_PW=<password>

  --authentication-db           (Default: admin) Authentication database

  --authentication-mechanism    (Default: SCRAM-SHA-1) Authentication mechanism.
                                Options: SCRAM-SHA-1 or SCRAM-SHA-256

  -s, --server                  (Default: 127.0.0.1:27017) Server

  -t, --tls-enabled             (Default: false) Use TLS

  -d, --db                      Required. Mongo Database to use

  --help                        Display this help screen.

  --version                     Display version information.

MangoSeed 1.0.0
Copyright (C) 2026 Giovanni Galbo

  -c, --collection              Required. The source collection

  -q, --query                   Required. ExportAsync query. example:
                                {name:'Harry'}

  --destination                 Destination path

  --disable-pretty-print        When disabled, json output is not indented

  --no-logo                     (Default: false) Skip logo

  -u, --user                    Username

  -p, --password                Password.  Alternatively use environment
                                variable MANGOSEED_DB_PW=<password>

  --authentication-db           (Default: admin) Authentication database

  --authentication-mechanism    (Default: SCRAM-SHA-1) Authentication mechanism.
                                Options: SCRAM-SHA-1 or SCRAM-SHA-256

options.description: Authentication mechanism.  Options: SCRAM-SHA-1 or SCRAM-SHA-256
When disabled, json output is not indented
Password.  Alternatively use environment variable MANGOSEED_DB_PW=<password>
Seed path. Can be single json file or directory containing json seed files
Authentication mechanism.  Options: SCRAM-SHA-1 or SCRAM-SHA-256
Number of documents to batch when inserting.  Use a higher number for small documents and a smaller number for very large documents
Drops the collection if it exists, including indexes.  Fast, but indexes will need to be recreated outside of MangoSeed

Action to take when an entry with a given ID already exists.  When truncating or dropping table, behavior will always be Nothing, which is the fastest setting.  Setting Nothing when there is a clash will result in an error.

Please note that all data mutations are not transactional.
Number of files that will be processed at the same time
Password.  Alternatively use environment variable MANGOSEED_DB_PW=<password>
Truncates the collection if it exists, but keeps the indexes.  Can be slow if the collection is large
